description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow set within a landscaped urban lot, featuring a flat roof with green sections and large, rectangular windows. The front facade is defined by a wide driveway leading to a garage, flanked by manicured lawns, flowering shrubs, and mature trees. The rear of the property includes a spacious paved area and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by privacy fencing and dense greenery. The building's exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. Multiple entry points and large glass doors provide access to the interior, while the overall layout maximizes both privacy and outdoor living space. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall and metal gates, integrating seamlessly into an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a rear swimming pool, enclosed by a low wall and metal gates.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, manicured lawns, and flowering shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green roof sections, side garden, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large paved area, swimming pool, and dense greenery for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional garden space, rear entry, and more flowering trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
